title: Bridge Paper: Gender Brain Structural Differences and Interoception.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
**Phase context:** interoception, interoceptive, heart-brain, vagal, insula, cardiorespiratory, breathing entrainment

Paper: Gender Brain Structural Differences and Interoception.
DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2020.586860
Abstract: Interoception, the ability to perceive inner body sensations, has been demonstrated to be different among genders, with a stronger female attention toward interoceptive information. No study correlated this capability with brain differences between males and females. This study aims to detect behavioral variances and structural neuroimaging interoception correlates in a sample of healthy volunteers matched for age.
